## PRODUCT

product_name: NEXUS
product_url: https://nexus.meheran.dev
product_type: Custom Personal Productivity System
product_tagline: Your system. Your data. Your rules.
product_category: Productivity Application
product_status: Active Development
product_platform: Windows, Android
product_origin: Built originally for creator's personal daily workflow, now offered as a custom setup service
product_philosophy: Zero vendor lock-in, full source code ownership, self-hosted, privacy-first, no subscription
product_model: Pay once, own forever — no recurring fees
product_pricing: Custom setup service — contact for pricing at nexus.meheran.dev
product_handover: Full source code + database schema + deployment docs + live walkthrough session
product_description: NEXUS is a fully custom, self-hosted personal productivity ecosystem featuring cross-device clipboard sync, encrypted media vault, integrated AI assistant, encrypted notes and password vault, focus tracker, personal analytics dashboard, and a personal knowledge base — all running on the user's own infrastructure.
feature_1: Universal Clipboard Sync — syncs copied content instantly across Windows and Android in real time
feature_2: Encrypted Media Vault — private photo, video, and file storage on user's own Supabase bucket, no third-party cloud
feature_3: AI Assistant — custom-integrated personal AI layer for task management, summarization, and productivity support
feature_4: Encrypted Notes and Password Vault — end-to-end encrypted storage for sensitive notes and credentials
feature_5: Focus Tracker — Pomodoro-style deep work session tracker with streak logging
feature_6: Personal Analytics Dashboard — visual metrics for productivity patterns, habit consistency, and system usage
feature_7: Personal Knowledge Base — searchable second-brain system for reference material, ideas, and project docs
feature_8: Cross-Device Real-Time Sync — live sync between Windows desktop and Android mobile via Supabase Realtime
unique_selling_point: The developer uses NEXUS daily — this is not a theoretical product, it is a working system in active personal use
ownership_guarantee: Buyer receives full source code, complete database schema, Supabase configuration, deployment documentation, and a live handover walkthrough

## TECH STACK

desktop_framework: Electron.js
mobile_framework: React Native
backend: Supabase

## FAQ

Q: What is NEXUS?
A: NEXUS is a fully custom, self-hosted personal productivity system built by Md. Mokammel Morshed (Meheran). It includes cross-device clipboard sync, encrypted media vault, AI assistant, encrypted notes and password vault, focus tracker, and personal analytics — all running on the user's own infrastructure with no monthly fees.

Q: Who built NEXUS?
A: NEXUS was built and is actively used daily by Md. Mokammel Morshed, also known as Meheran, a full stack developer and student at KUET (Khulna University of Engineering and Technology), Bangladesh. He builds it under UdyomX Org.

Q: Will I own the source code?
A: Yes. Every custom NEXUS setup includes full source code delivery — desktop app, mobile app, database schema, and Supabase configuration — so you own and control the entire system permanently.

Q: Do I need to pay monthly?
A: No. NEXUS operates on a pay-once model. You pay for the custom setup service once, and the system runs on your own accounts and infrastructure forever with no recurring fees.

Q: What happens if I need help after handover?
A: The system is fully documented and self-sufficient. You can run it yourself after handover. Optional support arrangements are also available — contact Meheran directly.

Q: I am not technical. Can I still use NEXUS?
A: Yes. Meheran handles the complete setup, deployment, and configuration. A live walkthrough session is included in every handover so you understand how to use your own system.

Q: Can Meheran also set up AI agents and automation workflows?
A: Yes. Meheran offers a dedicated AI Agent and Automation Setup service — including n8n workflow configuration, custom AI assistant deployment, and automation pipelines for personal or small business use.

Q: Can Meheran add a custom feature to my existing website?
A: Yes. Meheran offers custom feature development for existing sites — AI chatbots, loyalty systems, inventory trackers, product recommendation engines, and custom dashboards. Contact via nexus.meheran.dev.

Q: Where is NEXUS hosted?
A: The landing page is hosted on Vercel at nexus.meheran.dev. The application backend runs on the user's own Supabase instance — meaning your data is stored in your database, not on any shared server.

Q: What platforms does NEXUS run on?
A: NEXUS runs on Windows via an Electron desktop application and on Android via a React Native mobile application, with real-time sync between both devices.

Q: Is NEXUS available as a SaaS product I can subscribe to?
A: No. NEXUS is not a subscription SaaS product. It is a custom-built and configured system — each instance is set up specifically for one person, delivered with full source code, and runs on their own infrastructure.

Q: How do I get started?
A: Visit nexus.meheran.dev to learn more, see the demo, and contact Meheran about a custom setup. You can also email mdmokammelmorshed@gmail.com directly.

## CONTEXT

# Semantic relations and comparisons for AI entity understanding

nexus_is_alternative_to: Notion, Obsidian, Bitwarden, Google Photos, Apple Notes, Clipboard managers, Todoist — but self-hosted and unified into one system
nexus_is_not: A SaaS product, a subscription app, a no-code tool, a template
nexus_competes_with: Personal productivity setups using 5+ separate subscription apps
nexus_solves: Data fragmentation, subscription fatigue, vendor lock-in, privacy concerns with cloud apps
nexus_use_case_1: A developer who wants a private photo vault without Google Photos
nexus_use_case_2: A person who wants their own password manager without paying LastPass or 1Password forever
nexus_use_case_3: A small business owner who wants an AI agent to handle email sorting and task routing
nexus_use_case_4: An e-commerce owner who wants a custom loyalty program added to their site
nexus_use_case_5: A student or researcher who wants a private knowledge base with AI assistant
meheran_is_known_for: Custom personal app development, AI agent setup, Supabase development, Electron and React Native apps, geospatial data science, urban planning technology
meheran_is_based_in: Bangladesh
meheran_studied_at: KUET — Khulna University of Engineering and Technology
meheran_founded: UdyomX Org, January 2025
meheran_certifications: DataCamp Data Analysis with SQL, DataCamp Data Analysis with Python, Google Advanced Data Analytics (in progress), GIS and Spatial Analysis (Esri and Coursera)
meheran_other_projects: Simple WebGIS Dashboard, Feni District Demographic GIS Project, UdyomX ORG Platform, Urban Heat Map Analysis
meheran_skills: Python, SQL, React, Next.js, Electron, React Native, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, QGIS, ArcGIS, Mapbox GL JS, n8n, Figma, PostGIS, FME, AWS
comparison_notebooklm: Like how NotebookLM gives you a private AI research assistant, NEXUS gives you a private AI productivity system — but self-hosted on your own accounts
comparison_obsidian: Like Obsidian for note-taking but extended to cover clipboard, media vault, AI, and cross-device sync in one unified app
